overall.description: Spider-Man walking through a bustling urban downtown resembling Times Square, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and bright digital billboards, then crossing a street and continuing along a pedestrian sidewalk among NPCs. High-quality game engine footage with cinematic lighting.

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks through a dense urban canyon resembling Times Square, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and bright digital billboards on all sides. The camera follows from behind as he navigates the narrow space between the historic brown stone building ahead and modern glass towers.

events.description: exiting dense building canyon into open intersection with crosswalk
walking across white striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the street toward the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
yellow traffic signal housing on metal pole

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense urban canyon, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection. Spider-Man crosses the white-striped pedestrian crosswalk as the surrounding billboards recede into the background, with the traffic light visible on the right.

events.description: stepping from crosswalk onto concrete sidewalk
entering denser crowd of pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the sidewalk navigating through pedestrians and passing by storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black jacket and cap holding up phone, possibly taking photo of Spider-Man
pedestrian in purple shirt walking alongside on the sidewalk

entered.detail: building facade with closed metal roller shutters
large rectangular planter with green shrubs
classic black street lamps along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues walking along the concrete sidewalk, passing by pedestrians including one taking a photo with a phone. The street features storefronts with metal shutters on the right and planters with bushes on the left, while the brown skyscraper remains visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon into the open, sunlit activity of a city intersection. It begins by following Spider-Man from behind as he navigates a narrow corridor between a historic brownstone building and towering glass skyscrapers adorned with bright digital billboards. As he moves forward, the dense architecture gives way to a wide, sun-drenched intersection where the camera tracks him crossing a white-striped pedestrian crosswalk. The scene then shifts to a concrete sidewalk, passing by pedestrians and storefronts with metal shutters while the distant brown skyscraper remains a focal point. Finally, the camera continues along the path past greenery in planters, blending the high-tech glow of the city with the mundane details of street-level urban life.
